headline: Honeywell Partners with Rhombus to Launch AI-Powered Security Platform
summary: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is included among the 13 Best Diversified Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 26, Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) announced a collaboration with Rhombus, a cloud-based video management company, to expand its portfolio of cloud-connected security and access solutions. The partnership introduces new AI-powered video capabilities. The move builds on […]
